title: brachypodium genuense
intro: Brachypodium genuense, also known as Italian brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brachypodium genuense include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
